description_long: This is a large, industrial green metal shipping container with reinforced corners and ribbed sides, commonly used for storage or transport in urban environments. The container features double front doors with visible locking mechanisms and is accompanied by several red and white metal barrels, green jerry cans, and orange canisters placed nearby. A mounted industrial spotlight is attached to the top edge, suggesting use in construction or temporary work zones. The surface of the container is weathered, with visible scratches, rust, and faded white stenciled markings, including logos and serial numbers. The barrels and canisters are clustered mostly at one end, adding to the utilitarian, rugged appearance. The overall setup suggests a secure, heavy-duty storage solution for hazardous or valuable materials in an outdoor or industrial urban setting.
description: A large, weathered green metal shipping container with double doors, industrial spotlight, and clustered red barrels and canisters, designed for secure urban storage or transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with locking bars and two red barrels and canisters on the right side, plus a mounted spotlight on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the ribbed container wall, multiple barrels, canisters, and jerry cans in front, with the spotlight visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view with double doors, two barrels and a canister on the left, and the spotlight mounted on the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain ribbed wall of the container and the spotlight on top, with no barrels or canisters visible.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faded white stenciled logos and serial numbers on sides and doors
